Nodes.Name: Scribble
Nodes.Value:
Symmetry can be defined as
a transformation, in which case
it remains a 'live' part of a file.

Nodes.Name: Scribble
Nodes.Value:
Finding the horizontal and 
vertical extent of a shape can 
be done using bounding boxes.

Nodes.Name: Scribble
Nodes.Value:
RELAY objects can be used to organise
the wiring in a file. Double click on wires
to insert them, and double click on relays
to remove them.

Nodes.Name: Scribble
Nodes.Value:
Since distances can be any positive
value, sometimes it's a good idea to 
'remap' your numbers into a fixed domain.
This makes subsequent mathematics
easier to write.
